name: autobuild
tagline: Publish in admin, live in 60 seconds
highlights: Fires a Cloudflare Pages, Netlify, or Vercel build hook on every publish
Debounces rapid publishes into a single deploy (default 5s window)
Fire-and-forget: webhook failures log but never block the publish event
SSRF-hardened: rejects http, localhost, RFC1918, and link-local URLs
